description: Lifecycle status of an IoT fault dispatch record. Open records trigger duplicate-suppression in the dispatch agent.

options.label: Open
options.description: Dispatch is active. Technician is en route or working the fault.

options.label: Resolved
options.description: Technician has resolved the fault and closed the dispatch.

options.label: Cancelled
options.description: Dispatch was cancelled before the technician arrived.
